chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3216 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For Katcha Peshi. 14.02.2018. Mr. Meer Ahmed Mangrio, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. alongwith Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad. Through this petition, the main grievance of the petitioner is that his son namely Meenhon @ Yousif was taken away by the police of P.S B-Section Dadu on 04.10.2017 and on 05.10.2017 petitioner had filed an application before the learned Sessions Judge, Dadu and the same was disposed of on the statement of police officials that the custody of Meenhoon was not with them. Learned A.A.G has filed comments of respondents No.4, 5 and 6 and submits that the petitioner is involved in crime No.61 of 2017 of P.S Radhan for a narcotic case registered under section 9(c) Control of Narcotics Substances Act, 1997 and his arrest has been shown by the Radhan police, therefore, according to him, this petition has become infructuous and is liable to be disposed of. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of as the arrest of the alleged detainee has been shown in the said crime. However, the petitioner would be at liberty to initiate any criminal proceedings that the police officials have taken the custody of alleged detainee Meenhon @ Yousif, if he so desires, against the police and on filing such proceedings the competent court shall decide the same in accordance with law. However, the police officials are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
